title: Learning from other Employee Benefit Brokerages
excerpt: I work for an Employee Benefits Brokerage and would like to speak to someone who is willing to show me how your Brokerage is using Monday for internal Client Management.

posts.author: spenn (Shelby Penn)
posts.cookedHtml: I work for an Employee Benefits Brokerage and would like to speak to someone who is willing to show me how your Brokerage is using Monday for internal Client Management.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I don’t work for a brokerage. But if you want, list out what you’re hoping to do/achieve and maybe we can give ideas of how to set it up?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com
